memberdef.argsstring: (this, config_file, nx, ny, nz, nsoil, nsoiltype, nsurftype, rc)
memberdef.name: initialize

briefdescription.para: Initialize the CATChem model with configuration file and grid dimensions This method sets up the core CATChem infrastructure using the builder pattern, loads configuration from the specified file, and sets up the grid geometry.
Finalize the CATChem model and clean up resources.

memberdef.argsstring: (this, nx, ny, nz, nsoil, nsoiltype, nsurftype)
memberdef.name: get_grid_dimensions

briefdescription.para: Get current grid dimensions.
Add all enabled processes from configuration This method reads the ConfigManager data and adds all processes where enabled = true It automatically registers and adds each enabled process to the core.
Get names of all configured processes.
Get number of configured processes.
Run a single timestep This method executes one timestep of the CATChem simulation.
Run a specific phase This method executes a named phase of the simulation.
Run all configured phases in sequence This method executes all phases in the order they were configured using ConfigManager data.
Get names of configured run phases Note: This now gets phase information from ConfigManager.
Set chemical concentrations from host model This method transfers chemical species data from the host model to CATChem.
Get chemical concentrations to host model This method transfers chemical species data from CATChem to the host model.
Get names of available diagnostics This method retrieves the names of all available diagnostic fields.
Get a specific diagnostic field This method retrieves data for a named diagnostic field.
Get all diagnostic data This method retrieves all available diagnostic data.
Check if model is ready to run This method checks if all necessary components are initialized and configured.
Check if model is initialized.
get required met index for all the required met variables registered in process manager
Get diagnostic index based on field name.
Get direct access to the state manager (advanced usage)
Get direct access to the process manager (advanced usage)
Get direct access to the error manager.
Get direct access to the grid manager (advanced usage)
Get direct access to the diagnostic manager (advanced usage)
Automatically register a process based on its name This is a private helper method that calls the appropriate registration function based on the process name.
Main CATChem API interface type This type provides a simplified interface to the CATChem core functionality while maintaining access to all necessary components for host model integration.
